title.zh: 特朗普下令射杀伊朗船只，伊朗发布扣押视频
title.en: Trump Orders Shoot-to-Kill for Iranian Vessels, Iran Releases Seizure Video

title.zh: 以色列逮捕间谍士兵，伊朗收取霍尔木兹通行费
title.en: Israel Arrests Spying Soldiers, Iran Collects Hormuz Transit Fees

title.zh: 特朗普下令击杀伊朗船只，霍尔木兹海峡紧张升级
title.en: Trump Orders to Shoot Iranian Boats, Hormuz Strait Tensions Escalate

title.zh: 伊朗收取霍尔木兹海峡通行费，美国海军指挥官突然离职
title.en: Iran Collects Strait of Hormuz Tolls, US Navy Chief Resigns Abruptly

title.zh: 美伊紧张关系持续，霍尔木兹海峡局势复杂
title.en: US-Iran Tensions Continue, Strait of Hormuz Situation Complex

title.zh: 霍尔木兹海峡局势紧张，伊朗加强海上巡逻
title.en: Strait of Hormuz Tensions Escalate, Iran Increases Maritime Patrols

title.zh: 中东局势持续紧张，霍尔木兹海峡成为焦点
title.en: Middle East Situation Continues to Escalate, Strait of Hormuz Becomes Focus
